member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.CorrelationIdConstants
member.summary: Defines names used to propagate correlation identifiers through HTTP requests.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.CorrelationIdConstants.HeaderName
member.summary: Gets the HTTP header used to receive and return a correlation identifier.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.CorrelationIdConstants.ItemKey
member.summary: Gets the key used to store the current correlation identifier.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes
member.summary: Defines stable error codes for exceptions mapped by the API boundary.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Validation
member.summary: The default validation failure code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.NotFound
member.summary: The default resource-not-found code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Conflict
member.summary: The default conflict code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Unauthorized
member.summary: The authentication failure code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Forbidden
member.summary: The authorization failure code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Cancelled
member.summary: The request-cancellation code.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Api.Constants.ExceptionErrorCodes.Unexpected
member.summary: The unexpected server failure code.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Configures services owned by the HTTP API host.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.DependencyInjection.AddApi(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds API presentation services.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.DependencyInjection.UseApiPipeline(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Configures the ordered API middleware pipeline.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.AiTutorEndpoints
member.summary: Maps learner-owned local AI Tutor routes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.AiTutorEndpoints.MapAiTutorEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps AI Tutor conversation and administrator health endpoints.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.CourseEndpoints
member.summary: Maps administrator and instructor course-management endpoints.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.CourseEndpoints.MapCourseEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps course-management routes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.EnrollmentEndpoints
member.summary: Maps employee catalog and enrollment endpoints.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.EnrollmentEndpoints.MapEnrollmentEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps catalog and enrollment routes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.HealthEndpoints
member.summary: Maps liveness and readiness probes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.HealthEndpoints.MapPortalHealthChecks(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps health endpoints for orchestrators and load balancers.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.IdentityEndpoints
member.summary: Maps authentication commands to anonymous Minimal API endpoints.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.IdentityEndpoints.MapIdentityEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps login, refresh-token rotation, and refresh-token revocation endpoints.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.InstructorEligibilityEndpoints
member.summary: Maps instructor eligibility and skill routes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.InstructorEligibilityEndpoints.MapInstructorEligibilityEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps authenticated and administrator eligibility routes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.LearningEndpoints
member.summary: Maps learner player and progress routes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.LearningEndpoints.MapLearningEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps authenticated learner endpoints.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.LessonEndpoints
member.summary: Maps lesson-management endpoints.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.LessonEndpoints.MapLessonEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps authorized lesson routes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.QuizEndpoints
member.summary: Maps quiz authoring and learner-attempt routes.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.QuizEndpoints.MapQuizEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps quiz routes.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.UserManagementEndpoints
member.summary: Maps the compact administrator-only user-management API.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Endpoints.UserManagementEndpoints.MapUserManagementEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps user listing, lookup, enabled-state, and additive role operations.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ConflictException
member.summary: Represents an expected failure caused by a conflict with current resource state.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ConflictException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The safe error message returned to the caller.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ConflictException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the stable, machine-readable error code.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ForbiddenAccessException
member.summary: Represents an expected failure caused by insufficient permissions.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ForbiddenAccessException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The safe error message returned to the caller.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.ForbiddenAccessException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the stable, machine-readable error code.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.NotFoundException
member.summary: Represents an expected failure caused by a requested resource not being found.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.NotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The safe error message returned to the caller.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Api.Exceptions.NotFoundException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the stable, machine-readable error code.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.AuthorizationEndpointExtensions
member.summary: Provides strongly named authorization conventions for Minimal API endpoints and groups.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.AuthorizationEndpointExtensions.RequireAdministrator``1(``0)
member.summary: Requires the Administrator policy.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.AuthorizationEndpointExtensions.RequireInstructor``1(``0)
member.summary: Requires the Instructor policy, which also permits administrators.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.AuthorizationEndpointExtensions.RequireStudent``1(``0)
member.summary: Requires the Student policy, which also permits administrators.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.AuthorizationEndpointExtensions.RequireAdminOrInstructor``1(``0)
member.summary: Requires either the Administrator or Instructor policy.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.MiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Provides application builder extensions for the API's cross-cutting middleware.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.MiddlewareExtensions.UseCorrelationId(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds correlation identifier propagation to the request pipeline.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.MiddlewareExtensions.UseExceptionHandling(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds global exception-to-ProblemDetails conversion to the request pipeline.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Maps transport-independent results to HTTP responses.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToHttpResult``1(LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Result{``0})
member.summary: Converts a result into either an OK response or Problem Details.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Extensions.ResultExtensions.ToProblem(LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error)
member.summary: Converts an error into an RFC 7807 response.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Health.HealthResponseWriter
member.summary: Writes a compact JSON health report suitable for operators.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Health.HealthResponseWriter.WriteAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.HealthReport)
member.summary: Serializes the health report to the response body.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware
member.summary: Establishes and propagates a correlation identifier for every HTTP request.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Establishes and propagates a correlation identifier for every HTTP request.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.CorrelationIdMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes a request and makes its correlation identifier available to downstream components.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous middleware operation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Converts unhandled exceptions into safe RFC 7807 responses at the API boundary.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware})
member.summary: Converts unhandled exceptions into safe RFC 7807 responses at the API boundary.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,LearningPortal.Api.ProblemDetails.IApiProblemDetailsFactory)
member.summary: Executes the downstream pipeline and handles any unhandled exception.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous middleware operation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.ProblemDetails.ApiProblemDetailsFactory
member.summary: Creates safe and consistently structured RFC 7807 problem details documents.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Api.ProblemDetails.IApiProblemDetailsFactory
member.summary: Creates consistent RFC 7807 responses at the API boundary.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Api.ProblemDetails.IApiProblemDetailsFactory.Create(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,LearningPortal.Shared.Results.Error)
member.summary: Creates problem details for the specified application error and request.
member.returns: A populated RFC 7807 problem details document.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Provides a public entry point for integration-test hosting.
